title: Dependabot can't parse your go.mod
body:
Dependabot couldn't parse the go.mod found at `/go.mod`.

The error Dependabot encountered was:

```
go: github.com/docker/go-metrics@v0.0.1 requires
	github.com/prometheus/client_golang@v1.1.0 requires
	github.com/prometheus/common@v0.6.0 requires
	gopkg.in/alecthomas/kingpin.v2@v2.2.6: unrecognized import path "gopkg.in/alecthomas/kingpin.v2" (https fetch: Get https://gopkg.in/alecthomas/kingpin.v2?go-get=1: EOF)
```

[View the update logs](https://app.dependabot.com/accounts/containers/update-logs/16603586).
